name: Classic Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus with hyperglycemia

patient.free_text: 3-month history of increased thirst and urination with fatigue. Family history of diabetes.

source: Harrison's 21e chapter on Diabetes Mellitus (textbook presentation)
notes: Both symptoms AND labs are diagnostic. A working pipeline must return T2DM as the top result with graph_path referencing polyuria/polydipsia edges.
